---

> ### 💡 Treasury Insight: Costco Executive Breakeven
> Based on your May Costco spend, you're on pace for about **`$6,014`** in annual Costco purchases. Since the [Executive Membership](costco-hacks) pays for itself at **`$3,250/year`**, you're a strong candidate for the **2% annual reward**, which would earn you roughly **`$120`** back annually—more than covering the upgrade cost.

### Next Steps
- [ ] **Check membership tier:** If you aren't already an Executive member, you're likely leaving about `$55/year` in net rewards on the table.
- [ ] **Review "Death Star" items:** Next time you're at the Seattle Costco, look for an **asterisk (*)** on price tags for items you buy often; it means they won't be restocked, so it may be worth grabbing an extra unit.
- [ ] **Verify price codes:** Look for prices ending in **`.97`** (clearance) or **`.00`** (local manager markdowns) for the deepest savings on your next run.
